name: whoami_full
description: Full user and system identity: user, groups, hostname, OS, hardware model
command: echo '=== Identity ===' && echo "User: $(whoami)" && echo "UID: $(id)" && echo "Home: $HOME" && echo "Shell: $SHELL" && echo '' && echo '=== System ===' && echo "Hostname: $(hostname)" && echo "OS: $(cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null | grep PRETTY_NAME | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '"')" && echo "Kernel: $(uname -r)" && echo "Arch: $(uname -m)" && echo "Model: $(cat /proc/device-tree/model 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')" && echo "Serial: $(cat /proc/device-tree/serial-number 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')" && echo '' && echo '=== Groups ===' && groups
